creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 229726
set conflict in security/openconnect

I submit a new patch to add a conflict of security/openconnect with security/openconnect-devel.

Poudriere builds with the current ports tree have been tested in the following platforms/arch:

- 13.0-RELEASE amd64
- 13.0-RELEASE i386
- 12.2-RELEASE amd64
- 12.2-RELEASE i386

Additionally the port has passed successfully portfmt, portclippy and portlint.

Regards
